title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 44.
content:
There was an Old Man with a poker,
    Who painted his face with red oker;
    When they said, "You're a Guy!"
    He made no reply,
    But knocked them all down with his poker.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 44.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
